creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
Did you ever try contacting mwm@mired.org, the creator and maintainer of 
the original keylaunch, to see if your changes could be incorporated 
into his program?  That would seem better than a fork of the project.

(Am I correct in thinking that your program has all the functionality of 
the original keylaunch, but with an extra feature?  So there would be no 
problem with backwards compatibility?)

If you did email him, and either he didn't reply, or he was negative 
about the idea of using your ideas, we can look at other options.
